title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending the Public Employment Service Office (PESO) Laguna Province, Headed by Ms. Mary Jane B. Corcuera, Under the Leadership of the Honorable Governor Ramil L. Hernandez, for Being Conferred As the National Bayanihan Service Awardee for First Class Province Category During the 21st National Peso Congress Held Virtually Last September 23, 2021. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 09/27/2021)
